outline.emotional_arc_summary: Jace arrives on Mars with a sense of confidence and wonder, his excitement peaking as he breathes the Martian air for the first time. However, as he tours the settlement, the initial certainty begins to waver under the overwhelming reality of Mars, hinting at future challenges.
outline.pacing_notes: Begin with a slow, immersive build as Jace takes in his first moments on Mars, then maintain a steady, expansive pace through the tour, allowing for moments of reflection and dialogue to flesh out the world.
continuity_setup: Jace's interactions with Rich hint at future mentorship

beats.beat_summary: Jace arrives on Mars, greeted by Rich at the landing pad, and experiences the Martian air and gravity for the first time.
beats.emotional_start: Excited and confident about his arrival on Mars.
beats.emotional_end: Euphoric and grounded in the reality of his new environment.

sensory_palette.sight: Deep, rusty hue of Mars through shuttle windows.
sensory_palette.sound: Murmur of excited passengers and soft chime signaling final approach.

dialogue.speaker: char_lt_rich_cullivan
dialogue.subtext: Glad to see Jace has arrived safely.

dialogue.speaker: char_lt_rich_cullivan
dialogue.subtext: He knows the adjustment Jace is going through.

beats.beat_summary: Rich drives Jace through the U.S. settlement, explaining the geography and logistics while Jace begins to process the scale and complexity of life on Mars.
beats.emotional_start: Overwhelmed with excitement and wonder, ready to absorb everything.
beats.emotional_end: A slight dip in confidence as the reality of Mars' challenges begins to settle in.

sensory_palette.sight: Vast expanse of red dust and Olympus Mons in the distance.
sensory_palette.sound: Purring of the rover's engine and Rich's explanations.
sensory_palette.touch: Vibration of the rover beneath them.

dialogue.speaker: char_lt_rich_cullivan
dialogue.line: It's not just rocks and dust, Jace
dialogue.subtext: Mars is more complex than it appears.

artifact_metadata.voice_style: Wonder-forward, accessible prose aimed at middle-grade readers (ages 10-13).
